name: agentping
description: Notify when your AI agents finish and send concise completion summaries.

scripts.check: node --check plugins/agentping/scripts/pushdeer-lib.mjs && node --check plugins/agentping/scripts/pushdeer-notify.mjs && node --check plugins/agentping/scripts/pushdeer-notify-event.mjs && node --check plugins/agentping/scripts/pushdeer-stop-hook.mjs && node --check plugins/agentping/scripts/setup-pushdeer-key.mjs && node --check scripts/install.mjs && node --check scripts/uninstall.mjs && node --check scripts/doctor.mjs && node --check scripts/check-models.mjs && node --check scripts/model-utils.mjs && node --check scripts/config.mjs && node --check scripts/logs.mjs && node --check scripts/test-notifier.mjs && node --check bin/agentping.mjs && node --check bin/codex-pushdeer.mjs
scripts.notify:dry-run: AGENTPING_DRY_RUN=1 node plugins/agentping/scripts/pushdeer-notify.mjs --title 已完成AgentPing本地通知脚本dryrun验证当前不会真实发送消息
